archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast with Editorial Vibe

layout_spacing.marketing: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 p-6 md:p-12 lg:p-24
layout_spacing.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 p-4 md:p-8

components.buttons: rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 active:translate-y-0 text-white bg-primary_accent hover:bg-red-900
components.inputs: rounded-none border-b-2 border-border focus:border-primary_accent bg-transparent outline-none px-0 py-2
components.cards: rounded-none border border-black/10 bg-white shadow-none hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow duration-300
components.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#F8F6F0]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-black/5

media.brand_logo_instruction: Use purely typography (Cormorant Garamond, tracking-tight, text-2xl) and a Lucide GraduationCap icon. No image logo.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Elements must lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and gain a drop-shadow. Text links change to primary_accent.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade in content sequentially. Course cards stagger in on load.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure focus states have ring-2 ring-primary_accent.

specific_page_guidelines.marketing_landing: Use asymmetrical Tetris grid (grid-cols-12). Huge editorial typography. Hero image has max bg-black/20 overlay for contrast. Add subtle noise texture.
specific_page_guidelines.student_dashboard: Control Room grid. High density. Sidebar navigation. Use pure HTML/Tailwind for layout structure but Shadcn components for complex interactions like Tabs or Dropdowns.
specific_page_guidelines.course_viewer: Video player takes precedence (col-span-8), sidebar with lesson list (col-span-4). No distractions. Pure functional focus.
specific_page_guidelines.admin_panel: Dense data tables (Shadcn Table). Minimal padding (p-4) to fit more data. Strictly monotone with status badges (Yellow, Green, Red).

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., login-button, enroll-course-id, play-video-button).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Shadcn components heavily customized to be flat, brutalist (rounded-none, border-black/10).
Never use generic placeholder images, use the provided Unsplash/Pexels URLs.
Apply generous spacing on marketing pages (py-24, gap-12), and dense spacing on dashboards (p-6, gap-4).
Ensure all interactive UI has a defined hover and focus state with clear color changes.
Include data-testid on every button, link, and form input.
